title: Wire fallback pre-commit hook to omnidash + CI

results.evidence: omnidash/.pre-commit-config.yaml contains 'no-hardcoded-fallbacks' hook entry referencing scripts/check_no_hardcoded_fallbacks.sh — present on main (confirmed via git show origin/main:.pre-commit-config.yaml)

results.description: scripts/check_no_hardcoded_fallbacks.sh exists and checks staged TS/TSX files for ternary fallback patterns
results.evidence: omnidash/scripts/check_no_hardcoded_fallbacks.sh merged to main via PR #517 (commit 92c1b280) — scans staged TS/TSX/JS/JSX prod files for '? 0.xx : 0.xx' pattern, supports '// fallback-ok' suppression

results.description: CI workflow .github/workflows/no-hardcoded-fallbacks.yml scans all prod TS/TSX files (not just staged)
results.evidence: omnidash/.github/workflows/no-hardcoded-fallbacks.yml merged to main via PR #505 (commit 92415214) — runs on push/PR to main, greps full server/ shared/ src/ client/ config/ trees, excludes test/fixture/demo files
